title: TB10Cs3H2 snoRNA

infobox.value: This [molecular biology](/wiki/Molecular_biology "Molecular biology") article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=TB10Cs3H2_snoRNA&action=edit).

is a member of the H/ACA-like class of non-coding RNA ([ncRNA](/wiki/NcRNA "NcRNA")) molecule that guide the sites of modification of uridines to pseudouridines of substrate RNAs. It is known as a small nucleolar RNA ([snoRNA](/wiki/SnoRNA "SnoRNA")) thus named because of its cellular localization in the nucleolus of the eukaryotic cell. TB10Cs3H2 is predicted to guide the [pseudouridylation](/wiki/Pseudouridylation "Pseudouridylation") of LSU3 ribosomal RNA ([rRNA](/wiki/RRNA "RRNA")) at residue Ψ397.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

Liang XH, Uliel S, Hury A, Barth S, Doniger T, Unger, R, Michaeli S (May 2005). ["A genome-wide analysis of C/D and H/ACA-like small nucleolar RNAs in Trypanosoma brucei reveals a trypanosome-specific pattern of rRNA modification"](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1370750). *RNA*. **11** (5): 619–645. [doi](/wiki/Doi_(identifier) "Doi (identifier)"):[10.1261/rna.7174805](https://doi.org/10.1261%2Frna.7174805). [PMC](/wiki/PMC_(identifier) "PMC (identifier)") [1370750](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1370750). [PMID](/wiki/PMID_(identifier) "PMID (identifier)") [15840815](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/15840815).

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b6/TB10Cs3H2_snoRNA.PNG/250px-TB10Cs3H2_snoRNA.PNG)](/wiki/File:TB10Cs3H2_snoRNA.PNG)

Consensus structure of TB10Cs3H2

**TB10Cs3H2** is a member of the H/ACA-like class of non-coding RNA ([ncRNA](/wiki/NcRNA "NcRNA")) molecule that guide the sites of modification of uridines to pseudouridines of substrate RNAs. It is known as a small nucleolar RNA ([snoRNA](/wiki/SnoRNA "SnoRNA")) thus named because of its cellular localization in the nucleolus of the eukaryotic cell. TB10Cs3H2 is predicted to guide the [pseudouridylation](/wiki/Pseudouridylation "Pseudouridylation") of LSU3 ribosomal RNA ([rRNA](/wiki/RRNA "RRNA")) at residue Ψ397.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
